steps.title: Spot the structure: two separate anti-counterfeiting techniques
steps.content: The passage first describes Franklin weaving blue threads and muscovite into the paper, then introduces a completely different technique: stamping the notes with sage leaf imprints. These are separate anti-counterfeiting methods, not variations of the same approach.

steps.title: Choose the transition for adding a second method
steps.content:
”Moreover” signals an additional measure—the right choice when moving from one anti-counterfeiting technique to another. “For example” would misframe the sage leaves as an instance of the threading method; the others don't fit the additive structure.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
